extra.reason: shipped: path_glob/subject_type/permission rules + admin UI + replace-defaults semantics, doublestar globs, fuzzy implication. Out of scope for v1: deny rules, more-specific-wins precedence.

shipped: CodeMirror gutter with status-colored markers (blue=open, yellow=relocated), click on marker opens sidebar + focuses line, click on empty cell opens AddCommentModal pre-filled with the line. Resolved/orphaned hidden.

shipped: editor-area OverflowMenu with Move / Copy / Delete. Backend MoveFile/RemoveFile + comments.MovePath/DeletePath + indexer.Remove + auto-sync on each. Move auto-creates intermediate directories.

shipped: 'Add file' button in ArchiveTree sidebar (only for signed-in users). Modal accepts a nested path (folders implied) and optional initial body. Auto-navigates to the new doc. 'Add folder' deferred — nested paths cover the use case per the original ticket recommendation.

shipped: api_tokens table + Authorization: Bearer middleware + scope-aware authorize. Scopes: read/comment/write (each optionally :path). Account UI at /account mints, lists, revokes; plaintext shown once. Token-authenticated requests cannot mint further tokens.

shipped: enriched ?botready=1 markdown (Path, Updated, Git SHA, Version, Tags + Open Comments section) and ?botready=1&format=json variant (path/title/frontmatter/markdown/html/comments/git). Per-page share tokens land via the same api_tokens table using read:<path> scopes; UI in /account with a 'page share' radio that emits exactly read:<path>.

shipped: EnsureFromOIDC now links to existing local users by normalized email when no OIDC binding exists. Mismatch (email already bound to a different provider+subject) returns ErrOIDCMismatch; OIDC callback redirects to /login?oidc_error=mismatch with a translated banner. Five Go tests in internal/users/users_test.go cover create-new, idempotent, link-by-email, refuse-mismatch, case-insensitive email.

shipped: stdlib net/smtp transport with three encryption modes (none/starttls/tls), config block (email.host/port/username/password/encryption/from_address/from_name/reply_to/insecure_skip_verify), redacted status endpoint, 'send test email' admin button, Settings tab UI. No-op mailer when not configured so callers don't have to nil-check. Follow-ups filed as separate tickets for password reset + email verification.

shipped: POST /api/auth/forgot (always 204 — anti-enum) mints a sha256-hashed token, 60min expiry, single-use; emails a link via the SMTP infra from bd-2vu. POST /api/auth/reset validates len>=8, bcrypt-hashes new password, updates users.password_hash + marks token used_at in one tx. Frontend: /forgot, /reset routes + 'Forgot password?' link on LoginView. End-to-end verified: token consume → 204, reuse → 400, old password rejected, new password works.

shipped: POST /api/auth/verify (anon-OK) sha256-checks token, marks used_at, sets users.email_verified_at + COALESCEs the email column on the user. POST /api/auth/resend-verification (session-only, refuses token-auth) mints fresh token. Hook in Register sends initial verification email best-effort. Frontend: /verify route, unverified-email banner in CarbonShell, status + resend section in AccountView. End-to-end verified: verify → 204, reuse → 400, email_verified_at populated.

shipped: TOTP-only MFA. POST /api/auth/mfa/setup-start mints a fresh secret and returns a PNG QR (data: URI) + otpauth URL + base32 secret; setup-confirm flips totp_enabled_at after verifying a code. Login splits into two steps when MFA is enabled — password ok returns {mfa_required:true} and stashes mfa_pending_user_id in scs (half-auth); /api/auth/login/mfa consumes a TOTP code and rotates the session via RenewToken. Disable requires a current code (both user-side and admin-emergency endpoints). Admin: Users table grows a 2FA column + 'Disable 2FA' emergency unlock. End-to-end verified: setup → confirm → logout → login {mfa_required:true} → /api/me 204 → login/mfa → /api/me 200 → PUT 200.

shipped: nullable reply_to_id on comments with ON DELETE SET NULL. comments.Create flattens a reply-to-a-reply onto the root (one-parent-only schema). API: /api/comments accepts optional reply_to; rejects parents from a different document. UI: 'Reply' button on every non-resolved comment dispatches a Svelte event; CarbonShell consumes it and opens AddCommentModal with the parent's line/anchor preset. CommentsSidebar groups by line, then root-first + replies under their parent, with a left-border indent + 'reply' tag. End-to-end verified: root id=2, reply id=3 reply_to=2, grandchild id=4 reply_to=2 (flattened).

shipped v1: hybrid YAML + DB overrides via new internal/configsvc package (Service with Snapshot/Set/Unset/Subscribe, redacted audit). Migration 009 adds config_overrides + config_audit. 7 Go tests in internal/configsvc/configsvc_test.go cover snapshot, set, unset, validation, subscribe-on-prefix, audit redaction, sensitive-value masking. Admin endpoints: GET schema/effective/audit/export, PATCH config. 35 fields registered (17 live-editable, 2 sensitive). Mailer subscribes to email.* and hot-rebuilds — verified end-to-end: PATCH email.host + email.from_address flips the mailer from disabled to enabled without restart. Auth.Service + API handlers read live snapshot for AllowAnonymousRead, LocalEnabled, repo.commit_author_*, auto_push, server.base_url. Frontend: ConfigEditor component in /admin Settings tab renders schema-driven form (Toggle/Select/NumberInput/PasswordInput/TextInput per type), per-field 'override' / 'yaml default' / 'configured' tags + revert button, recent edits DataTable, export-as-YAML download link. Deferred to follow-ups: OIDC live reload, render live reload, cross-field validation.
